name: subscription_ecom_v1
create_sql:
-- Schema: subscription_ecom_v1 (Subscription-box e-commerce with recurring billing)

CREATE TABLE customers (
  customer_id INT PK,
  email VARCHAR,
  signup_date DATE,
  referral_source VARCHAR,
  ltv DECIMAL(10,2)
);

CREATE TABLE plans (
  plan_id INT PK,
  name VARCHAR,
  price_monthly DECIMAL(8,2),
  billing_cycle VARCHAR,
  max_boxes INT
);

CREATE TABLE subscriptions (
  sub_id INT PK,
  customer_id INT FK(customers),
  plan_id INT FK(plans),
  status VARCHAR,
  start_date DATE,
  end_date DATE,
  next_billing DATE
);

CREATE TABLE shipments (
  shipment_id INT PK,
  sub_id INT FK(subscriptions),
  shipped_date DATE,
  delivered_date DATE,
  carrier VARCHAR,
  tracking_number VARCHAR
);

CREATE TABLE invoices (
  invoice_id INT PK,
  sub_id INT FK(subscriptions),
  amount DECIMAL(8,2),
  status VARCHAR,
  issued_date DATE,
  paid_date DATE
);
